heading: Cooperative aviation centers

children.heading: Administrator
children.label: 1 Administrator
children.text: The term “Administrator” means the Under Secretary of Commerce for Oceans and Atmosphere and the Administrator of the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration.

children.heading: Cooperative Aviation Center
children.label: 2 Cooperative Aviation Center
children.text: The term “Cooperative Aviation Center” means a Cooperative Aviation Center designated under subsection (b)(1).

children.heading: Designation required
children.label: 1 Designation required
children.text: The Administrator shall designate one or more Cooperative Aviation Centers for the commissioned officer corps of the Administration at institutions described in paragraph (3).

children.heading: Purpose
children.label: 2 Purpose
children.text: The purpose of Cooperative Aviation Centers is to facilitate the development and recruitment of aviators for the commissioned officer corps of the Administration.

children.label: A
children.text: applies to enter into an agreement with the Administrator providing for the establishment of the program at the institution;

children.label: B
children.text: has, as a part of its curriculum, a four-year baccalaureate program of professional flight and piloting instruction that is accredited by the Aviation Accreditation Board International; and

children.label: C
children.text: is located in a geographic area that experiences a wide variation in climate-related activity, including frequent high winds, convective activity (including tornadoes), periods of low visibility, heat, and snow and ice episodes, to provide opportunities for pilots to demonstrate skill in all weather conditions compatible with future encounters during their service in the commissioned officer corps of the Administration.

children.heading: Assignment
children.label: 1 Assignment
children.text: The Administrator shall assign an officer or employee of the commissioned officer corps of the Administration to serve as the Cooperative Aviation Centers Advisor.

children.label: A
children.text: coordinate all engagement of the Administration with Cooperative Aviation Centers, including assistance with curriculum development; and

children.label: B
children.text: serve as the chief aviation recruiting officer for the commissioned officer corps of the Administration.
